attemptsAfterGeneratedReport.detail: CoreDevice reported the iPhone 15 Pro as available (paired), but xcodebuild printed an interactive Password: prompt before any XCTest pass/fail output. The run was interrupted rather than entering credentials.

toolingNotes: Running without PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin failed before device launch because xcodegen was not on this shell PATH, even though xcrun --find xcodegen resolved /opt/homebrew/bin/xcodegen.

xcrun xctrace list devices currently lists 00008130-001955E91EF8001C under Devices Offline; xcrun devicectl list devices currently lists the same iPhone 15 Pro as C9130C48-48F1-5DC3-98E9-8BACE231D047 with state available (paired).
